shows.title: Combating Chronic Disease / Fireball Events
shows.first_half: First Half: Constitutional attorney Jonathan W. Emord discusses the "Arizona Statement," a proposal to address chronic disease in America. He'll delve into its origins and the coalition of lawyers, scientists, farmers, and policymakers behind it.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author and researcher Marshall Masters examines the March 17, 2026, Ohio bolide and a reported increase in large fireball events. He outlines his concerns about this rising activity and shares basic preparedness tips, including lessons from the 2013 Chelyabinsk superbolide.

shows.title: Understanding Karma / Soul Writing
shows.first_half: First Half: Intuitive spiritual medium Geoffrey Jowett will explain the ancient Indian concept of Karma and how we can understand it in order to help break patterns and create a more conscious future, as he links positive and negative actions to their outcomes.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author Joanne DiMaggio discusses Soul Writing, a meditative practice used to access insight, and the deep knowing we hold within us. She explores its use for self-analysis, healing, guidance, and the development of intuitive and psychic abilities.

shows.title: Trends Analysis / Mediumship & the Soul
shows.first_half: First Half: Publisher and trends strategist Gerald Celente will explain the process of tracking trends to understand where we are, how we got here, and where we are going. He'll share which megatrends are shaping the future and how we can prepare, prevail, and prosper.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Spiritual medium and author Carole J. Obley will discuss mediumship communications and the nature of the soul. She will present her perspectives on life and the meaning of the challenges we face.

shows.title: NDE & UFOs / Afterlife Evidence
shows.first_half: First Half: Filmmaker and UFO researcher L.A. Marzulli will discuss his near-death experience and how it changed his life. He will also talk about the state of ufology today, if we are close to disclosure, and the meaning of ET life and their visits and abductions.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Professor Michael Zigarelli delves into what happens after we die. He argues that there is a surprisingly credible, scientific case that death is not our demise, but a doorway. This, he says, is supported by the thousands who have walked through that door and returned to tell about it.

shows.title: Sasquatch Interactions / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Connie Willis (info) will be joined by Mike Paterson, a Canadian researcher known for his unconventional and controversial field work in Sasquatch investigations. He'll share detailed accounts of ongoing, direct interactions with a group of beings he identifies as Sasquatch in an undisclosed region of Ontario, Canada. Paterson has documented his experiences through extensive audio recordings, video footage, and other supporting evidence. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half. Give Connie a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
